articles.title: GLM 5.2测评：跻身第一梯队
articles.excerpt: 老规矩私有bench 案例都很不错 第三个在这个案例中做热力学图的模型，前两个是Mythos和3.5Flash 正如知乎nao榜所言，日后通过中转贩子使用opus的人，都需要面对一个问题，你用的opus如果是glm5.2冒充的，而且难以分辨。 在实际bot agent体验上，如果不是对opus4.6特别熟悉的人基本无法分辨出两者。并且其追随上文的能力很强。如果上文用的opus，继续用glm5.2根本无法分别。 其缺点目前来看，上下文注意力可能不如4.6强（说实在的比4.6强的也几乎没有）。这次上1M上下文盲猜的DS V4的技术落地，DSA的注意力只能说目前来看中规中矩而已。 不过真的恭喜智谱啊

Tool-augmented agents attempt to address this by augmenting VLMs with specialist perception modules, yet their effectiveness is bounded by the action interface through which those tools are invoked. articles.summary: SpatialClaw重新审视了工具增强视觉语言模型用于3D空间推理时的动作接口，分析了不同接口对感知模块调用效果的约束，提出改进以提升物体定位与关系理解能力。

articles.title: WEAVER, Better, Faster, Longer: An Effective World Model for Robotic Manipulation
articles.excerpt: The potential impacts of world models (WMs, i.e., learned simulators) on robotics are far-reaching -- policy evaluation, policy improvement, and test-time planning -- all with limited real-world interaction. articles.summary: WEAVER是一个满足保真度、一致性和长程预测三项要求的机器人操作世界模型（学习模拟器），支持在有限真实交互下进行策略评估、改进和测试时规划。

articles.title: MiniMax Sparse Attention
articles.excerpt: Ultra-long-context capability is becoming indispensable for frontier LLMs: agentic workflows, repository-scale code reasoning, and persistent memory all require the model to jointly attend over hundreds of thousands to millions of tokens, yet the quadratic cost of softmax attention makes this untenable at deployment scale. We introduce MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), a blockwise sparse attention b
articles.summary: MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA) 是一种块稀疏注意力机制，用于解决超长上下文LLM中softmax注意力的二次复杂度，支持百万级token的agentic工作流和仓库级代码推理。

articles.title: MoVerse: Real-Time Video World Modeling with Panoramic Gaussian Scaffold
articles.excerpt: We present MoVerse, a real-time video world model that creates an interactively navigable scene from a single narrow-field-of-view image. This setting is challenging because the input observes only a small fraction of the environment, while interactive roaming requires a complete surrounding world, persistent geometry, controllable camera motion, and temporally coherent high-fidelity observations.
articles.summary: MoVerse是一个基于全景高斯支架的实时视频世界模型，能从单张窄视场图像生成可交互导航的完整场景，支持可控相机运动和时间连贯的高保真观测。

articles.title: Demystifying Hidden-State Recurrence: Switchable Latent Reasoning with On-Policy Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Latent chain-of-thought compresses reasoning by replacing visible reasoning traces with continuous hidden-state recurrence, but existing formulations are difficult to optimize with standard on-policy reinforcement learning (RL) and hard to interpret causally. articles.summary: 该工作通过一对显式边界token（入口和出口锚点）将隐状态循环推理转化为可用在线策略强化学习优化的形式，兼具因果可解释性，压缩了推理过程。

articles.title: APPO: Agentic Procedural Policy Optimization
articles.excerpt: Recent advances in agentic Reinforcement Learning (RL) have substantially improved the multi-turn tool-use capabilities of large language model agents. However, most existing methods assign credit over coarse heuristic units, such as tool-call boundaries or fixed workflows, making it difficult to identify which intermediate decisions influence downstream outcomes. In this work, we study agentic RL
articles.summary: APPO（Agentic Procedural Policy Optimization）改进了多轮工具使用场景下的信用分配，通过过程化策略优化识别中间决策对下游结果的影响，提升语言智能体强化学习的效率。

articles.title: World Pilot: Steering Vision-Language-Action Models with World-Action Priors
articles.excerpt: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models inherit semantic grounding from large-scale pretraining and perform competently across in-distribution manipulation tasks. This grounding, however, is built on static image-text pairs, whereas manipulation is a continuous, contact-rich process whose dynamics this pretraining cannot capture. articles.summary: World Pilot是一个视觉-语言-动作（VLA）框架，通过注入世界-动作先验弥补静态图像-文本预训练对连续动态理解的不足，提升操作策略在接触丰富任务中的物理合理性。

articles.title: Which Models Are Our Models Built On? Auditing Invisible Dependencies in Modern LLMs
articles.excerpt: Modern LLM training pipelines increasingly rely on other models to generate data, filter corpora, judge outputs, and guide development decisions.
